mnemonics: S.A.F.E. Groundwork: Scope, Assumptions, Feasibility, Expectations
keyPoints: Clearly define the project scope and objectives to set a shared vision
Identify and document all assumptions and constraints early to mitigate risks
Conduct a thorough feasibility study covering technical, economic, and operational aspects
commonMistakes: Skipping stakeholder analysis and not properly identifying all key players
Failing to document assumptions, leading to scope creep and misunderstandings later
Underestimating the importance of a feasibility study, resulting in unviable projects
